response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:36: Performance of 'Sympathy' by VTubers. Found lyrics on Piapro. 2. 01:36-02:24: Narrative/Comic scene. 3. 02:24-04:59: Performance of 'M@GICAL☆CURE! LOVE SHOT!' by Anya and Hatsune Miku. Found lyrics on Genius.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance of the song 'Sympathy' by four VTubers (Moona Hoshinova, Pavolia Reine, Anya Melfissa, and Tsunomaki Watame), followed by a comic-style narrative scene, and concluding with a vocal performance of 'M@GICAL☆CURE! LOVE SHOT!' by Anya Melfissa and Hatsune Miku.

scenes.description: A performance of the song 'Sympathy' by four VTubers. The song title is visible at the top left corner.
scenes.performer_in_video: Moona Hoshinova, Pavolia Reine, Anya Melfissa, Tsunomaki Watame
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
死んじゃえってさ
そのナイフで切り裂く
勇気もないくせに
死にたいよってさ
あの世の切符、手にする
勇気もないくせに

誰だって
心に抱えた闇
蝕まれ
死にゆくのを見つめる

心の悲鳴
血を吐くように
叫んでも
誰にも聴こえない
届かない
みんなの黒い声は
僕の中で響いているのに

死んじゃえってさ
血にまみれた心は
言葉の針山に
死にたいよってさ
血にまみれた躰は
それでも生き続け

誰だって
失ってから気づく
奪われて
目を向ければ消えてる

気づいてよって
前に佇み
手を振れど
誰にも見えない
映らない
みんなの黒い影は
僕の中で渦巻いてるのに

誰だって
未来を夢見ていた
いつだろう
何処かに捨ててしまったのは

Sympathy...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(They cry out)
Even if I scream
As if vomiting blood
No one can hear it
It doesn't reach
Everyone's black voices
Are echoing inside of me

(They cry out)
The blood-stained heart
Is a needle mountain of words
'I want to die', you say
The blood-stained body
Even so, continues to live

Anyone
Notices after they lose it
When it's taken away
And you turn your eyes to it, it's already gone

Notice it, you say
Standing in front of you
Even if I wave my hand
No one can see it
It's not reflected
Everyone's black shadows
Are swirling inside of me

Anyone
Was dreaming of the future
When was it
That I threw it away somewhere?

Sympathy...

scenes.description: A comic strip-style narrative scene with Japanese text and English subtitles, narrated by a voice.
A performance of the song 'M@GICAL☆CURE! LOVE SHOT!' by Anya Melfissa and Hatsune Miku. Title is shown on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(Intro)
Hello everyone!
I'm Hatsune Miku, a virtual idol!
Well, that's what everyone seems to think, but secretly I'm -

(Chorus)
(Uryaoi!! Uryaoi!! Oooo Fighter!)
(Super Powerful Miku-chan!)
(Uryaoi!! Uryaoi!! Oooo Cyber!)
(Miku Miku Miku go!)

(Verse 1)
I wake up to a call
Put my frilly outfit on now
It's time I open up my eyes and start the day
I combat till the dawn
Until every villain’s gone wah!
A clumsy trip and now I’ve fallen to my butt
With my magical phone
And a silly little ringtone
I’ll shout a magic word and set the world in place
Whatever it may cost
There’s no reason to stop
For a world that I cherish and love

(Verse 2)
Monsters might
Be a scary foe to fight
But I’ll take the stand
If I can stop your tears and wipe them dry
(I’ll make you feel magical!)
If my pain's a type of cure for peace, I don’t mind
I can play as a nurse healing you everyday
So what if I might shed a tear, get some bruises?
A wipe is all I need to clean the cherry blush away, ha!
Fighting through the night, but I’m wide awake
It can all be so hard for me to get through the day
Your smile is enough to heal all my aches
Wrapped in a cute band-aid
I can take the pain
Fight all day
Fill up the syringe
With love heal up the world
And go again

(Chorus)
(Uryaoi!! Uryaoi!! Oooo Fighter!)
(Super Powerful Miku-chan!)
(Uryaoi!! Uryaoi!! Oooo Cyber!)
(Miku Miku Miku go!)

(Bridge)
And now, it's time for the moment you've been waiting for!
1! 2! 3! ready?
Miku Miku beam!
Keep going!

(Verse 3)
On my own
Without anyone to know
How my job’s not all rainbows
But then I think about your smile
I’m a magically bright invincible girl!
If you need me to heal, go on and call out my name
When you find yourself going down a spiral
I’ll bonk away what puts you down, a pink hammer melee! yah!
Fighting through the night, but I’m wide awake
All alone it’s so hard for me to get through the rain
Your smile is enough to make my day
So I stand tall and brave
‘cause I’m not afraid
Any pain
I can laugh away
Chin up
With love I’ll fight on till the end

(Verse 4)
Bearing through the pain I try to be brave
As long as you can stay happy I’m okay
I’m not gonna bend! ha!
I can be a cure for peace in your heart
And I’ll play as a nurse healing you everyday
Your smile is enough to heal all my aches
All in a cute band-aid
If you’re feeling pain
Call my name
I’ll be by your side
Till I see your smile beam bright again

(Chorus)
(Uryaoi!! Uryaoi!! Oooo Fighter!)
(Super Powerful Miku-chan!)
(Uryaoi!! Uryaoi!! Oooo Cyber!)
(Miku Miku Miku go!)

(Outro)
A a, nemui yo ~
